reference: I have had postherpetic neuralgia for ten years. It has been pretty mild. I went through a stressful period this summer when my company was sold, and the pain increased greatly. Will it subside again, or could this be a new normal? Is there anything else I can do besides resting? I am taking Neurontin, Advil, and lots of vitamins.
text: I have had post-herpetic neuralgia for 10 years. It has been pretty mild. I went through a stressful period this summer when my company was sold, and the pain increased greatly. Will it subside again, or could this be a new normal? Is there anything else I can do besides resting? I am taking Neurontin, Advil, and lots of vitamins.
